prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement backend plugin management: the plugin process supervisor, the gRPC client connection to backend plugins, the plugin health check, and the plugin restart policy on crash.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement backend plugin management: the plugin process supervisor, the gRPC client connection to backend plugins, the plugin health check, and the plugin restart policy on crash.
